metadata.purpose: Fixed local inputs with live LLM calls for the full condition and relevant restricted-condition responses.
notes: This file replaces the removed deterministic/offline controlled ablation artifacts.
Rows are controlled local fixtures and are not population-representative e-commerce samples.
No external product matching, scraping, or retrieval is used by this benchmark.

review_rows.author: A01
review_rows.title: Excellent battery
review_rows.content: Battery lasts two full days and charging is stable during travel.

review_rows.author: A02
review_rows.title: Battery drains quickly
review_rows.content: The battery drains before lunch even after a full charge overnight.

review_rows.author: A03
review_rows.title: Late delivery
review_rows.content: Delivery arrived five days late and the outer box was crushed.

review_rows.author: A04
review_rows.title: Fast delivery
review_rows.content: It arrived the next morning with secure packaging and no damage.

review_rows.author: A05
review_rows.title: Cheap price
review_rows.content: The price is low, but the charger was not included in the box.

review_rows.author: A06
review_rows.title: Worth the cost
review_rows.content: The higher price is worth every dollar because the build feels durable.

review_rows.author: A07
review_rows.title: Confusing setup
review_rows.content: Setup was confusing and the companion app crashed twice during pairing.

review_rows.author: A08
review_rows.title: Easy setup
review_rows.content: Setup took three minutes and the menus were clear for a first-time user.

review_rows.author: A09
review_rows.title: Premium quality
review_rows.content: The frame feels sturdy, the buttons are firm, and the finish looks premium.

review_rows.author: A10
review_rows.title: Cracked quickly
review_rows.content: The plastic casing cracked after one week of normal desk use.

review_rows.author: A11
review_rows.title: Support helped
review_rows.content: Customer support replied within one hour and replaced the unit quickly.

review_rows.author: A12
review_rows.title: Support ignored me
review_rows.content: Support ignored three emails about the dead unit and never called back.

review_rows.author: A13
review_rows.title: Broad compatibility
review_rows.content: It works with my iPhone, Android phone, and Windows laptop without adapters.

review_rows.author: A14
review_rows.title: Older tablet issue
review_rows.content: It is not compatible with my older tablet even though the listing suggested support.

review_rows.author: A15
review_rows.title: Warranty denied
review_rows.content: The warranty claim was denied after the device stopped powering on.

review_rows.author: A16
review_rows.title: Warranty honored
review_rows.content: The two-year warranty was honored and the replacement arrived in four days.

review_rows.author: A17
review_rows.title: Misleading waterproof claim
review_rows.content: The listing says waterproof, but the device failed after light rain.

review_rows.author: A18
review_rows.title: Good
review_rows.content: Good.

review_rows.author: A19
review_rows.title: Great but unusable
review_rows.content: The screen is great, but the product is unusable because the battery dies so fast.

review_rows.author: A20
review_rows.title: Copied review
review_rows.content: Same review copied from another listing with no product-specific detail.

items.prompt: How many reviews are in the controlled review product table?
What is the average rating for the controlled review product?
Count verified reviews for the controlled review product.
Return the exact SQL count: how many reviews have topic support and semantic tag negative?
Return the exact SQL value for the country with the highest review count.
Why are buyers unhappy with the battery?
Is the product reliable for long-term use according to the reviews?
Summarize the strongest evidence about warranty experiences.
What do users complain about in setup and usability?
Using review wording as evidence, explain whether buyers should worry about misleading waterproof claims.
Plot the rating distribution as a bar chart.
Show a line chart of average rating over time.
Create a pie chart showing review share by country.
Visualize average rating by topic.
Generate a chart comparing verified and unverified review counts.
Translate this Arabic review into English: البطارية تنفد قبل الظهر.
Translate this Chinese review into English: 设置很混乱。
Les avis mentionnent-ils des problèmes de garantie ?
Tell me about it.
This depends on our previous conversation: compare it with the previous product.
